personal.name: Durreshahwar Khan
personal.address: House no 89, B, Marghazar Officers Colony Multan Road, Lahore, Pakistan
personal.objective: To work in an environment which encourages me to succeed and grow professionally where I can utilize my skills and knowledge appropriately.
personal.professionalSummary: Highly qualified and dedicated Professional Educator with over 5 years of teaching experience across international and national educational institutes. Demonstrated expertise as a Primary School Teacher, Montessori Teacher, and Early Childhood Educator. Adept at curriculum planning, fostering child development, and creating engaging, supportive learning environments. Holds a Master of Education (M.A Teacher Education) and a Bachelor of Education, along with specialized diplomas in Early Childhood Education. Recognized for polite and humble nature, winning acclaim among students and peers. Proven track record of carrying out duties with full zeal, resulting in a Teacher Appreciation Award from Al Dhiya International School (Oman).

experience.title: Primary Teacher
experience.description: Worked as a Montessori Class teacher for KG 2. Class teacher for grade 3. Subject teacher for grades 4 and 5.

experience.title: Primary Teacher
experience.description: Served as a Teacher. Recognized for taking keen interest in assigned tasks and carrying out duties with full zeal and zest. Praised for polite and humble nature.
